speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome to our dealership! You're looking at a fantastic 2018 Toyota Prius Two, known for its amazing fuel efficiency and legendary reliability. With over 50 MPG, this car is perfect for anyone looking to save at the pump while enjoying a smooth ride. This lightly-used beauty has been well-maintained and boasts a clean history, making it an ideal choice for commuters!

args.message: Thanks for the pitch! A couple quick questions: Has this Prius been in any accidents, even minor ones? And can you walk me through the maintenance history—what kind of work has been done recently?

text: Thanks for the pitch! A couple quick questions: Has this Prius been in any accidents, even minor ones? And can you walk me through the maintenance history—what kind of work has been done recently?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great questions! This Prius has a clean history and has never been in any accidents. As for maintenance, it has received regular services, including an oil change and a fresh tire rotation just recently! So it's in excellent condition and ready for the road.

text: Great questions! This Prius has a clean history and has never been in any accidents. As for maintenance, it has received regular services, including an oil change and a fresh tire rotation just recently! So it's in excellent condition and ready for the road.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Good to hear. One more thing—at 71,000 miles, has the hybrid battery been checked or serviced? And are there any known issues, even small ones, that I should be aware of?

text: Good to hear. One more thing—at 71,000 miles, has the hybrid battery been checked or serviced? And are there any known issues, even small ones, that I should be aware of?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely, the hybrid battery has been thoroughly checked recently and is functioning perfectly—no issues there! It's one of the key advantages of a Toyota Prius. As for known issues, there's nothing significant to report. Just minor wear you might expect from any used car, but we’ve ensured everything is in top-notch condition.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Perfect. What's the maintenance schedule looking like going forward? And just to confirm—is the asking price of $18,495 firm, or is there any flexibility there?

text: Perfect. What's the maintenance schedule looking like going forward? And just to confirm—is the asking price of $18,495 firm, or is there any flexibility there?

speaker: seller

args.message: The maintenance schedule for a Prius is pretty straightforward. Routine services typically include oil changes every 5,000-7,500 miles and tire rotations every 5,000 miles. The hybrid battery is designed to last a long time, so you can expect less frequent major service needs, which is a great benefit!

args.message: I appreciate your interest! I can definitely work with you a little, but I'd like to keep it close to the asking price since it's already a fantastic deal. How about we meet at $18,295? That should be a win-win!
